creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 234451
deskutils/remind: update to 04.00.01

A patch release.  Upstream changes:

 - Add $SuppressLRM system variable to suppress the UTF-8
   Left-to-Right mark in "remind -c" output.
 - Document the "q" sub-option to the "-p" option.

Changelog:	https://git.skoll.ca/Skollsoft-Public/Remind/src/branch/master/docs/WHATSNEW

Tested on arm64 FreeBSD 13.
